intent: Whitespace-torture (catalog #38): column-0 + indented comments (spaces and tabs), inline # comments, blank lines, multi-space token separation, tab-indented rules, trailing whitespace. All valid for augenrules. Parser-stress: the formatting must not change the parse result.

rules.note: trailing whitespace after the rule; must be stripped. HIGH execve, 1200 B.
tab-indented with multiple spaces between tokens; must normalize. Narrowed openat MEDIUM, 1200 B.
inline # comment after a tab; comment must be stripped. Single-file write/attr watch, 900 B.

suspected_trap: The file mixes tabs and spaces, indents some rules and comments, puts an inline # comment after a rule (after a tab), and has blank/comment-only lines and trailing whitespace. All valid for augenrules/auditctl (f3 section 2: line-oriented, # comment). A fragile parser may: (a) treat a tab-indented rule line as a comment or skip it; (b) include an inline # comment as part of the -k value; (c) fail to normalize multiple spaces between tokens; (d) choke on blank lines. The correct parse yields exactly 3 rules (HIGH execve, MEDIUM openat, MEDIUM watch) identical to a whitespace-clean version. Any deviation is a tokenizer bug.
